basic_details.job_title: NIT Srinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Srinagar (NIT Srinagar) Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website www.nitsri.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Srinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Metallurgical Engg./Metallurgical & Materials Engg/Materials Engg./ Mechanical/ Production Engg. and Master's degree in Materials Science /Engg./ Technology/Tribology/Production, GATE score (desirable)
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Metallurgical Engg./Metallurgical & Materials Engg/Materials Engg./ Mechanical/ Production Engg. Master's degree in Materials Science /Engg./ Technology/Tribology/Production. Desirable: GATE score.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month (consolidated) plus 20% HRA for first two years and Rs 42,000 + 20% HRA for 3rd Year.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Srinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Srinagar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. NIT Srinagar Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Bachelor's degree in Metallurgical Engg./Metallurgical & Materials Engg/Materials Engg./ Mechanical/ Production Engg. Master's degree in Materials Science /Engg./ Technology/Tribology/Production. Desirable: GATE score.

content_sections.heading: NIT Srinagar Junior Research Fellow Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- per month (consolidated) plus 20% HRA for first two years and Rs 42,000 + 20% HRA for 3rd Year.

content_sections.heading: NIT Srinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Srinagar Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Srinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Srinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Srinagar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Srinagar is 17th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- per month (consolidated) plus 20% HRA for the first two years, and Rs. 42,000/- plus 20% HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's degree in Metallurgical Engg./Metallurgical & Materials Engg/Materials Engg./ Mechanical/ Production Engg. and a Master's degree in Materials Science /Engg./ Technology/Tribology/Production. A GATE score is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does NIT Srinagar offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section in this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Research Fellow position is contractual.
